evals.prompt: Implement a 'World-Locked Marker' script that detects an image marker, captures its world position, and luego detaches its child content so it stays fixed in space even if the marker moves away.
evals.expected_output: A script using MarkerTrackingComponent and re-parenting logic.
expectations: Sets content.setParent(null) or parents to a world-root object
Optionally calls markerTracking.enabled = false after finding to save power

evals.prompt: Create a logic that enables a 3D model only when a specific marker ID (e.g., 'marker_01') is being tracked.
evals.expected_output: A script checking marker ID and tracking state.
expectations: Checks markerTracking.marker.markerId or similar identity property
Registers listeners for both onMarkerFound and onMarkerLost
Sets model.enabled = true on found, false on lost
